const unsigned char 	move_cursor_sound[2511] = {16,15,16,15,15,16,15,16,15,16,16,15,16,15,16,15,15,16,15,16,15,16,16,15,16,15,16,15,16,16,15,16,15,16,16,14,15,17,15,14,16,17,15,14,16,16,14,15,17,16,14,15,17,16,14,16,17,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,17,16,15,15,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,16,16,16,15,16,16,15,16,17,16,15,14,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,14,15,16,17,15,14,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,17,16,14,15,16,17,15,14,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,15,16,16,16,15,15,16,16,15,15,15,16,16,15,1
